---
title: 'Hills'
date: '2014-10-18T17:55:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1586214520507468411'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/hills_18.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

The rolling hills of the 170 hwy rose and fell to his left as he sauntered off to work.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
